head.hi: The Secretary of State to Minister Sherrill.
head.note: Same to the American Embassy, Petropolis.

div.p: I have sent the legations at Quito and Lima the following telegraphic instructions (May 15, supra):

In explaining this to the minister for foreign affairs express very cordially my gratification that the views of our Government have proved so happily to coincide and my earnest hope that our cooperative efforts may be successful. Cable at once whether the Government to which you are accredited assents to publication of the note in the three capitals by the respective Governments so soon as each has been informed that it has been presented.
